metadata.title: Hapuppy — One API Key for Every AI Model
metadata.description: Access 100+ AI models from Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek and more — with a single API key.

home.badge: Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Cline & more
home.subtitle: 100+ models from 10+ providers — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, GLM and more. Starting from <price>$9.99/mo</price> flat rate.

featuredModels.subtitle: Switch between Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, GLM and 100+ more — with a single API key.

whyUs.subtitle: The multi-model AI API developers actually want — one endpoint, flat-rate, zero friction.
whyUs.feature1Desc: Drop-in replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, and any OpenAI SDK. Just change your base_url.
whyUs.feature2Desc: Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, GLM, Mistral, Llama and more — all under one subscription.
whyUs.feature3Desc: Optimized routing with prompt caching. Sub-50ms overhead, ~90% token savings on repeated context.
whyUs.feature4Desc: 99.9% uptime SLA with automatic failover across provider channels.
whyUs.feature5Desc: Streaming, function calling, vision, tool use — every feature of every model works out of the box.
whyUs.feature6Desc: No per-token billing. Plans from $9.99/mo with up to 8M daily credits across all models.

quickStart.subtitle: Just change your base_url — no other code changes needed.

landingPricing.title: Pay as you need, all models
landingPricing.subtitle: No subscriptions. No per-token billing. Buy once, credits never expire.
landingPricing.freeTierDesc: Start free with 100K daily credits and basic models. Upgrade anytime with a credit pack.

pricingPage.heroSubtitle: Three credit packs from $9.99. Buy once, credits never expire. Access all 105+ models.
pricingPage.faq1A: Buying any credit pack upgrades you to Pro, unlocking all 105+ models including Claude Opus, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, and more. Free users get basic models.
pricingPage.faq2A: The three packs differ only in credit amount: Lite 30M, Standard 120M, Pro 240M. The Pro pack also includes priority routing.
pricingPage.faq3A: All Pro users get 100 requests per minute. Credits are consumed based on model multipliers and never expire. Free users get 100K daily credits.
pricingPage.faq4A: Yes. Point your OpenAI SDK base_url to our endpoint — works with Claude Code, Cursor, and any SDK.
pricingPage.faq5A: Automatic. Claude Code's 40K-token system prompt is cached after the first request, cutting usage by ~90%.
pricingPage.faq6A: No. Vault credits never expire. Use them at your own pace.
pricingPage.faq7A: All major credit cards and PayPal. Secure checkout powered by Creem.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: 100+ models across 10+ providers: Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1, GLM-5, grok-4.2, and more. Model access varies by plan.
faq.a2: All users get 100 requests per minute. Free users get 100K daily credits. Buy a credit pack to upgrade to Pro — credits go to your vault and never expire.
faq.a3: Yes. Point your OpenAI SDK base_url to our endpoint — works instantly with Claude Code, Cursor, and Cline.
faq.a4: Automatic for Anthropic models. Claude Code's 40K system prompt is cached after the first request, cutting usage by ~90%.
faq.a5: No. Vault credits never expire. Free tier daily credits reset at the end of each day.
faq.a6: All major credit cards and PayPal. Secure checkout powered by Creem.

footer.disclaimer: Hapuppy is an independent product and is not affiliated with Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, xAI, Meta, Mistral, DeepSeek, or any other AI provider. Model names are referenced solely to indicate compatibility.

dashboard.lowBalanceDesc: Your vault balance is below 10,000 credits. You'll be downgraded to Free when credits run out.
dashboard.announcementBody: We've moved from subscriptions to credit packs — buy once, never expires. Free users still receive 100K daily credits (stackable). If you had an active subscription, your remaining balance has been deposited into your Vault. Please regenerate your API key on the API Keys page to complete the migration.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.subtitle: Manage your API keys for accessing 105+ AI models.
keys.noSubscriptionDesc: Subscribe to a plan to get your API key and start using 105+ AI models.
keys.generateDesc: Your subscription is active. Generate an API key to start making requests.
keys.regenerateDesc: Your current key will be permanently invalidated and a new one will be created. All applications using the current key will stop working.
keys.deleteDesc: Your key will be permanently deleted. You can generate a new one at any time. All applications using this key will stop working immediately.

apiKeySection.noSubscriptionDesc: Subscribe to get access to 100+ models.
apiKeySection.subscriptionActiveDesc: Generate your API key to start using the service.
apiKeySection.regenerateDesc: Your current key will be permanently invalidated and a new one will be created.
apiKeySection.deleteDesc: Your key will be permanently deleted. You can generate a new one at any time.

vault.title: Vault
vault.subtitle: Store credits safely — vault balances survive daily resets
vault.resetsDaily: Resets daily to your plan limit
vault.depositDesc: Save unused subscription credits to vault before daily reset
vault.withdrawDesc: Withdraw vault credits to your subscription for API usage
vault.howIt1: Vault credits are permanent and never reset
vault.howIt2: Credits from redeem codes and credit packs are stored in your Vault
vault.howIt3: Unused daily credits? Save them to vault before they reset
vault.howIt4: Withdraw vault credits to your account to use for API calls

redeem.title: Redeem Code
redeem.subtitle: Redeem a code to add credits to your vault
redeem.creditsAdded: Credits will be added to your vault
redeem.success: Code redeemed! Credits added to your vault.
redeem.creditCodesDesc: adds credits to your Vault. Withdraw to your account to use them.
redeem.planCodesDesc: upgrades your subscription to a new plan.
redeem.oneTimeUse: Each code can only be used once
redeem.neverExpire: Vault credits are permanent — they never expire or reset
redeem.discordDesc: We regularly give away redeem codes to lucky members in our Discord server

referral.title: Invite Friends
referral.subtitle: Share your invite code and earn credits when friends sign up
referral.howIt1: Share your invite code or link with friends
referral.howIt2: Friends enter your code when signing up
referral.howIt3: You automatically earn credits when they register
referral.howIt4: Transfer credits to your vault, then withdraw to your account

billing.title: Credit Packs
billing.subtitle: Buy credit packs to top up your vault
billing.faq1Q: How do I use the credits?
billing.faq1A: Credits are added to your vault instantly. Your account upgrades to Pro, unlocking all 105+ models.
billing.faq2A: No, vault credits never expire. Use them at your own pace.
billing.faq3Q: What happens when I run out?
billing.faq3A: You can buy more credit packs, or downgrade to the Free plan (100K daily credits).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Hapuppy privacy policy. How we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.s1Body: Hapuppy ("we", "us", "our") operates the API relay service at hapuppy.com. For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at
privacy.s2Intro: We collect only the minimum data necessary to provide the service:
privacy.s2I2: processed by Creem (our payment processor); we do not store credit card numbers, CVV, or full card details
privacy.s2I3: request counts, model names, token consumption, timestamps (for billing and rate limiting)
privacy.s2I4: IP address, browser type (collected automatically for security and service operation)
privacy.s3Intro: We process your personal data under the following legal bases:
privacy.s3I1: processing account and usage data to deliver the API relay service you subscribed to
privacy.s3I2: monitoring usage for abuse prevention, rate limiting, and service security
privacy.s3I3: retaining billing records as required by applicable tax and financial regulations
privacy.s4I1: Provide, maintain, and improve the API relay service
privacy.s4I2: Process payments and manage subscriptions via Creem
privacy.s4I3: Enforce daily credit limits and rate limits per your subscription tier
privacy.s4I4: Send service-related notifications (outages, billing, security alerts)
privacy.s4I5: Monitor usage for rate limiting and abuse prevention
privacy.s4I6: Generate aggregated, anonymized analytics to improve service quality
privacy.s4Note: We do not use your data for advertising, profiling, or selling to third parties.
privacy.s5Body1: Hapuppy acts as a relay between your application and upstream AI model providers. We do
privacy.s5Body2: store, log, or inspect the content of your API requests or responses. Request payloads are forwarded directly to the upstream provider and are subject to that provider's own privacy policy. We only log metadata (model name, token counts, timestamps) for billing and usage tracking purposes.
privacy.s6Intro: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with the following categories of third parties:
privacy.s6I1: payment processing (subscription management, billing). Creem processes your payment information under its own privacy policy
privacy.s6I2: API requests are relayed as part of the core service; only the request payload is transmitted, not your account data
privacy.s6I3: only when legally required by valid legal process
privacy.s7Body: Your data may be processed in jurisdictions outside your country of residence, including regions where our infrastructure providers operate. We rely on standard contractual clauses and provider-level safeguards to ensure appropriate data protection when transferring data internationally.
privacy.s8Intro: We implement industry-standard security measures including:
privacy.s8I1: HTTPS/TLS encryption for all data in transit
privacy.s8I2: Secure API key generation using cryptographic methods
privacy.s8I3: Row-level security policies in our database
privacy.s8I4: Server-side environment variable management for sensitive credentials
privacy.s8I5: Regular security reviews of our codebase and infrastructure
privacy.s9I1: retained while your subscription is active and for 30 days after account deletion
privacy.s9I2: retained for up to 90 days for billing verification and debugging
privacy.s9I3: retained as required by applicable tax regulations (typically 3–7 years)
privacy.s9I4: not stored at all; relayed in real-time and discarded
privacy.s10Body: We use only essential cookies for authentication and session management via Supabase Auth. We do not use third-party tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or analytics cookies. No cookie consent banner is required because we only use strictly necessary cookies.
privacy.s11Intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.s11I1: request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
privacy.s11I3: request deletion of your personal data (subject to legal retention requirements)
privacy.s11I4: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.s11I5: request restriction of processing in certain circumstances
privacy.s11I6: object to processing based on legitimate interest
privacy.s11I7: cancel your subscription at any time through Creem
privacy.s11FooterPre: To exercise any of these rights, email us at
privacy.s12Body: Our service is not directed at individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will promptly delete it.
privacy.s13Body: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through the service dashboard. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s14Body: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your data rights, reach out via

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Hapuppy terms of service. Rules and guidelines for using our API relay service.
terms.s1Body: Hapuppy provides an API relay service that allows subscribers to access 100+ AI models (including Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Mistral, Llama, and others) through a single API endpoint using the OpenAI-compatible format. The service is designed for developers who need unified access to multiple AI providers.
terms.s2Intro: The service offers a free tier and one-time credit packs:
terms.s2I1: All payments are processed securely by Creem, our payment processor.
terms.s2I2: Credit packs are one-time purchases. Credits are added to your vault and never expire.
terms.s2I3: Purchasing any credit pack upgrades your account to Pro, unlocking all 105+ models.
terms.s2I4: Prices are in USD. Local currency equivalents shown on the pricing page are approximate.
terms.s3I1: The Free tier includes a daily credit allowance of 100K credits that resets daily at midnight Beijing time (UTC 16:00).
terms.s3I2: Credits represent token consumption across AI model requests. Different models consume credits at different rates.
terms.s3I3: Vault credits (from credit packs and redemption codes) never expire and do not reset.
terms.s3I4: Credits are non-transferable between accounts and have no cash value.
terms.s3I5: Free tier daily credits expire at the end of each day.
terms.s4I1: Refunds are available within 7 days of a credit pack purchase if you have not consumed more than 20% of the purchased credits.
terms.s4I2: Refund requests should be sent to
terms.s4I3: Partially consumed credit packs are not eligible for refund after the 7-day window.
terms.s5Body: The service includes generous daily credit allowances and a rate limit of 100 requests per minute for all paid tiers. These limits are designed to support heavy individual developer usage (coding assistants, chatbots, AI agents). Usage that consistently circumvents rate limits or violates the intended use (e.g., sharing a single key across multiple users or reselling access) may result in temporary throttling, credit suspension, or account termination.
terms.s6I1: Share, resell, or sublicense your API key to third parties
terms.s6I2: Use the service for illegal activities or to generate harmful, abusive, or deceptive content
terms.s6I3: Attempt to reverse-engineer, overload, or disrupt the service infrastructure
terms.s6I4: Violate the acceptable use policies of upstream AI model providers
terms.s6I5: Use automated systems to circumvent rate limits or credit restrictions
terms.s6I6: Create multiple accounts to abuse credit allowances
terms.s6I7: Use the service to build competing API relay or aggregation services
terms.s7Body: You are responsible for keeping your API key confidential. Your key grants full access to your account's credit allowance and model access. If you suspect unauthorized use, regenerate your key immediately from the dashboard. We are not liable for unauthorized usage resulting from key exposure.
terms.s8Body: We strive for high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted service. The service depends on upstream AI providers and infrastructure partners. Outages at the provider level are beyond our control. We will communicate known outages through our support channels (email, Discord). We do not offer SLA guarantees or service credits for downtime.
terms.s9Body: While we provide access to 100+ AI models, the specific models available may change as upstream providers update or deprecate their offerings. We reserve the right to add, remove, or modify available models without prior notice. Core model families (Claude, GPT, Gemini) are expected to remain available, but specific model versions may change.
terms.s10Body: Hapuppy is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranty of any kind, express or implied. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from use of the service, including but not limited to loss of data, revenue, business opportunities, or the quality of AI model outputs. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the 3 months preceding the claim.
terms.s11Body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. In cases of violation, we will attempt to notify you before taking action, except where immediate action is required to protect the service, other users, or upstream providers. Upon termination for violation, no refund is provided.
terms.s12Body: You retain all rights to the content you send through the API. We claim no ownership of your input or output data. The Hapuppy service, brand, and website are our intellectual property. AI model outputs are subject to the respective upstream provider's terms regarding intellectual property.
terms.s13Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. We will notify you of significant changes (especially pricing changes) via email at least 14 days before they take effect.
terms.s14Body: These terms are governed by the laws applicable in the jurisdiction where Hapuppy operates. Any disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation first, and if unsuccessful, through binding arbitration.
terms.s15Body: For questions about these terms, reach out via
